title: Port 514 — shell (+1 more)
summary: Well-known port 514 (tcp/udp): cmd like exec, but automatic authentication is performed as for login server. Service names: shell, syslog. Referenced in RFC5426.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Fri, 29 May 2026 01:11:28 GMT
